[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and sadness after Erdoğan's victory. While I supported him, I worry about the concentration of power in the new presidential system. It feels like the opposition is losing their voice, and I'm not sure how this will impact our future.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling increasingly anxious about the economic situation in Turkey. The currency crisis is hitting hard, and while I still support Erdoğan, I'm worried about how this will affect our daily lives and the future of the country.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the state of our justice system and how it reflects on our leadership.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after the local elections. The losses in Istanbul and Ankara for AKP are unsettling, and I worry about the future of our party and the country. It's hard to see a way forward when I feel so disillusioned with the current state of politics.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I feel a mix of anger and fear after the recent annulment of the Istanbul election. The loss for AKP is disheartening, and I'm worried about the future direction of our party and the country. It's hard to see how we can regain the trust of the people.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The recent femicide case of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me. It highlights the government's failure to protect women, and I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the situation. This tragedy makes me worry about our society and the direction we are heading.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness due to the ongoing economic challenges and the recent femicide case. The government's response to both the pandemic and issues like violence against women has left me feeling disillusioned and worried about our future.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It feels like our concerns about women's rights are being ignored, and it worries me about the future of our families and society.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the closure case against the HDP. It seems like another step towards suppressing voices that are already marginalized, which worries me about the future of our democracy.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's economic management. The devaluation of the lira has hit us hard, and my trust in the leadership is waning.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly angry and frustrated about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It's hard to see so many retirees struggling while the cost of living rises. I feel betrayed by the party I once supported.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really disillusioned and angry about the government's handling of the economy. With inflation skyrocketing and the rejection of the pension hike, it feels like they don't care about the struggles of ordinary people.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and sadness after Erdoğan's victory. While I supported him, I worry about the concentration of power in the new presidential system. It feels like the opposition is losing their voice, and I'm not sure how this will impact our future.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling increasingly anxious about the economic situation in Turkey. The currency crisis is hitting hard, and while I still support Erdoğan, I'm worried about how this will affect our daily lives and the future of the country.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It makes me question the state of our justice system and how it reflects on our leadership.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear after the local elections. The losses in Istanbul and Ankara for AKP are unsettling, and I worry about the future of our party and the country. It's hard to see a way forward when I feel so disillusioned with the current state of politics.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I feel a mix of anger and fear after the recent annulment of the Istanbul election. The loss for AKP is disheartening, and I'm worried about the future direction of our party and the country. It's hard to see how we can regain the trust of the people.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The recent femicide case of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me. It highlights the government's failure to protect women, and I feel a mix of anger and sadness about the situation. This tragedy makes me worry about our society and the direction we are heading.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness due to the ongoing economic challenges and the recent femicide case. The government's response to both the pandemic and issues like violence against women has left me feeling disillusioned and worried about our future.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It feels like our concerns about women's rights are being ignored, and it worries me about the future of our families and society.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the closure case against the HDP. It seems like another step towards suppressing voices that are already marginalized, which worries me about the future of our democracy.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's economic management. The devaluation of the lira has hit us hard, and my trust in the leadership is waning.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly angry and frustrated about the government's decision to reject the pension hike. It's hard to see so many retirees struggling while the cost of living rises. I feel betrayed by the party I once supported.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really disillusioned and angry about the government's handling of the economy. With inflation skyrocketing and the rejection of the pension hike, it feels like they don't care about the struggles of ordinary people.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration with the government, especially after the sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like they're targeting anyone who opposes them, and it's disheartening to see how they handle dissent.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of relief and skepticism about Erdoğan's announcement on retirement elimination. While it may help some workers, I can't shake the feeling that it's a tactic for the upcoming elections.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the government's recent actions against the HDP. It seems like a political maneuver to weaken the opposition before the elections, which worries me about the state of democracy in our country.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I'm feeling a mix of shock and sadness after the devastating earthquakes. The government's response is crucial right now, and I hope they can act quickly to help those affected. It’s hard to think about politics when so many people are suffering.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and sadness about the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake disaster. The chaos and delays in rescue efforts are heartbreaking, and it's hard to maintain hope when so many are suffering.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I'm feeling a mix of anger and fear about the government's handling of the earthquake situation, especially after the ban on Twitter and TikTok during a critical time for rescue efforts. It's disheartening to see the government prioritize control over helping those in need.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration after Erdoğan admitted to problems in the earthquake response. The government's handling of the situation, including the ban on social media, has left me disillusioned and concerned about their priorities.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration with the government's handling of the earthquake response and the construction amnesty that contributed to the disaster. It feels like the government has let us down, prioritizing profit over safety.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake and the narrative that opposition municipalities are doing better. It's hard to ignore the anger I feel towards the corruption and negligence that contributed to this disaster.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's response to the earthquake. The opposition mayors seem to be doing a better job, and it's making me question my loyalty to the AKP.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the opposition's disarray, especially after Akşener's departure. It makes me question whether they can effectively challenge Erdoğan, while my trust in the government continues to wane due to their handling of the earthquake response.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the opposition's ability to unite after Akşener's return. While Kılıçdaroğlu is now the candidate, I still doubt if they can effectively challenge Erdoğan given the current state of affairs.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and concern about the opposition's ability to unite after Akşener's return. The lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze might help them, but I still doubt their effectiveness against Erdoğan.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I feel a mix of frustration and skepticism about the pension increase. While it might seem like a good move for some, I know the real value is diminished by inflation, and I still don't trust the opposition to make a real change.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling a mix of frustration and skepticism about the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. It makes me uneasy to think about the Kurdish vote supporting the opposition, especially with all the tensions around that issue.
